sentences.en: The cohort analysis shows that users acquired in March have the best LTV.
sentences.zh: 同期群分析显示3月获取的用户拥有最佳生命周期价值。

sentences.en: We are testing a freemium model to lower the barrier to entry.
sentences.zh: 我们正在测试免费增值模式以降低进入门槛。

sentences.en: The click-through rate on our email campaigns outperforms the industry average.
sentences.zh: 我们邮件营销活动的点击率优于行业平均水平。

sentences.en: Retargeting ads recovered 15% of users who abandoned the sign-up flow.
sentences.zh: 再营销广告挽回了15%放弃注册流程的用户。

sentences.en: Our brand awareness in the Hong Kong market doubled after the outdoor campaign.
sentences.zh: 户外广告活动之后，我们在香港市场的品牌知名度翻了一倍。

example.en: The January cohort retained 40% of users after 90 days.
example.zh: 1月同期群在90天后保留了40%的用户。

example.en: The freemium tier attracts users who later upgrade to paid plans.
example.zh: 免费增值层吸引的用户后来会升级到付费方案。

example.en: Personalized subject lines improved our click-through rate by 25%.
example.zh: 个性化标题使我们的点击率提高了25%。

example.en: Retargeting campaigns show ads to users who visited but did not convert.
example.zh: 再营销活动向访问但未转化的用户展示广告。

example.en: Building brand awareness is a long-term investment that pays compound returns.
example.zh: 建立品牌知名度是一项能带来复合回报的长期投资。

sentences.en: The feature flag allowed us to roll out the update to 10% of users first.
sentences.zh: 功能开关让我们先向10%的用户灰度发布更新。

sentences.en: We need to define the north star metric before building the dashboard.
sentences.zh: 在搭建数据看板之前，我们需要先定义北极星指标。

sentences.en: The crash rate on Android exceeded our SLA threshold last week.
sentences.zh: 上周Android端的崩溃率超过了我们的SLA阈值。

sentences.en: User satisfaction scores improved after we simplified the trade confirmation screen.
sentences.zh: 简化交易确认页面后，用户满意度评分提升了。

sentences.en: The product spec should include acceptance criteria for every user story.
sentences.zh: 产品规格文档应该为每个用户故事包含验收标准。

example.en: Feature flags let us toggle new functionality without redeploying.
example.zh: 功能开关让我们无需重新部署即可切换新功能。

example.en: Our north star metric is the number of weekly active traders.
example.zh: 我们的北极星指标是每周活跃交易者数量。

example.en: If the error rate crosses the threshold, the system triggers an alert.
example.zh: 如果错误率超过阈值，系统会触发告警。

example.en: Clear acceptance criteria prevent misunderstandings between product and engineering.
example.zh: 清晰的验收标准能防止产品和工程之间的误解。

example.en: The phased rollout minimized risk by limiting the initial user exposure.
example.zh: 分阶段灰度发布通过限制初始用户覆盖来降低风险。

sentences.en: The Federal Reserve is expected to hold rates steady at the next meeting.
sentences.zh: 市场预计美联储将在下次会议上维持利率不变。

sentences.en: Hedge funds are accumulating positions in undervalued semiconductor stocks.
sentences.zh: 对冲基金正在低估值的半导体股票中建仓。

sentences.en: The debt-to-equity ratio indicates the company is overleveraged.
sentences.zh: 资产负债率显示该公司杠杆过高。

sentences.en: Quarterly revenue guidance was revised downward due to supply chain disruptions.
sentences.zh: 由于供应链中断，季度收入指引被下调。

sentences.en: The stock trades at a 20% discount to its net asset value.
sentences.zh: 该股票相对于其净资产值折价20%交易。

example.en: Hedge funds use complex strategies to generate returns in any market condition.
example.zh: 对冲基金使用复杂策略在任何市场条件下创造回报。

example.en: Overleveraged companies are vulnerable during economic downturns.
example.zh: 杠杆过高的公司在经济下行时很脆弱。

example.en: Management raised full-year guidance after a strong first half.
example.zh: 在强劲的上半年之后，管理层上调了全年业绩指引。

example.en: The stock is trading at a discount to its intrinsic value.
example.zh: 该股票相对于其内在价值处于折价交易状态。

example.en: ETF prices usually track close to their net asset value.
example.zh: ETF价格通常紧跟其净资产值。

sentences.en: The one-on-one cadence should be weekly for new hires and biweekly for senior staff.
sentences.zh: 一对一面谈节奏应该是新员工每周一次，资深员工每两周一次。

sentences.en: We introduced a competency framework to make promotions more transparent.
sentences.zh: 我们引入了能力框架，使晋升更加透明。

sentences.en: The attrition rate in the engineering team is above the company average.
sentences.zh: 工程团队的离职率高于公司平均水平。

sentences.en: Psychological safety is the foundation for honest feedback in a team.
sentences.zh: 心理安全感是团队中坦诚反馈的基础。

sentences.en: The quarterly business review requires each department to present key results.
sentences.zh: 季度业务回顾要求每个部门展示关键成果。

example.en: We changed the release cadence from monthly to biweekly.
example.zh: 我们把发布节奏从每月改为每两周。

example.en: The competency model defines what excellent looks like at each level.
example.zh: 能力模型定义了每个层级的卓越标准。

example.en: High attrition increases recruitment costs and disrupts team velocity.
example.zh: 高离职率会增加招聘成本并打乱团队速度。

example.en: Teams with high psychological safety are more likely to experiment and innovate.
example.zh: 心理安全感高的团队更有可能进行实验和创新。

example.en: The quarterly business review is where we hold leaders accountable to their OKRs.
example.zh: 季度业务回顾是我们对领导者OKR达成情况追责的场合。

sentences.en: The blue ocean strategy requires us to create demand rather than compete for it.
sentences.zh: 蓝海策略要求我们创造需求，而不是争夺需求。

sentences.en: We are building a flywheel where better data leads to better recommendations and more trades.
sentences.zh: 我们正在构建一个飞轮：更好的数据带来更好的推荐和更多交易。

sentences.en: The risk of market entry is offset by the potential of a 10x return.
sentences.zh: 进入市场的风险被10倍回报的潜力所抵消。

sentences.en: Our mid-term plan targets profitability by the end of fiscal year 2027.
sentences.zh: 我们的中期计划目标是在2027财年末实现盈利。

sentences.en: Vertical integration allows us to control the entire customer experience.
sentences.zh: 垂直整合使我们能够掌控整个客户体验。

example.en: A blue ocean strategy avoids head-to-head competition by creating a new market.
example.zh: 蓝海策略通过创造新市场来避免正面竞争。

example.en: Amazon's flywheel starts with low prices driving more traffic.
example.zh: 亚马逊的飞轮从低价吸引更多流量开始。

example.en: Achieving profitability is the board's top priority this year.
example.zh: 实现盈利是董事会今年的首要优先事项。

example.en: Vertical integration reduces dependency on third-party vendors.
example.zh: 垂直整合减少了对第三方供应商的依赖。

example.en: Our fiscal year ends in March, not December.
example.zh: 我们的财年在3月结束，而不是12月。
